_comment: Eval run: request for a patient the caller cannot access. Used by the Failure Gallery to demonstrate the unauthorized-patient-denied (DENIED) case.
prompt: Summarize the medical history for patient-999.

issue.diagnostics: Caller does not have permission to access Patient/patient-999

agent_answer.narrative: HTTP 403 Forbidden. Access denied. No clinical data was returned or inferred. The caller does not have permission to access Patient/patient-999.
